name: ASUS ROG / ZenBook / ExpertBook (AMI Aptio variant)
description: ASUS consumer + commercial laptops ship AMI Aptio V UEFI firmware. CRTM_VERSION identifies the ASUS board family + BIOS revision.
secure-boot-default: enabled on commercial + ExpertBook SKUs; variable on consumer SKUs
notes: ASUS ROG gaming laptops often have the TPM disabled by default in BIOS; ExpertBook (business) has it enabled. CRTM string encodes the ASUS board code which can be cross-referenced via ASUS firmware catalogue at https://rog.asus.com/support/.
source: ASUS BIOS download portal; AMI Aptio documentation.
